title: All Divisions With the Highest Score of a Binary Array
titleCn: 分组得分最高的所有下标

testcases.input: nums = [0,0,1,0] Output: [2,4] Explanation: Division at index - 0: numsleft is []. numsright is [0,0,1,0]. The score is 0 + 1 = 1. - 1: numsleft is [0]. numsright is [0,1,0]. The score is 1 + 1 = 2. - 2: numsleft is [0,0]. numsright is [1,0]. The score is 2 + 1 = 3. - 3: numsleft is [0,0,1]. numsright is [0]. The score is 2 + 0 = 2. - 4: numsleft is [0,0,1,0]. numsright is []. The score is 3 + 0 = 3. Indices 2 and 4 both have the highest possible division score 3. Note the answer [4,2] would also be accepted.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,4] Explanation: Division at index - 0: numsleft is []. numsright is [0,0,1,0]. The score is 0 + 1 = 1. - 1: numsleft is [0]. numsright is [0,1,0]. The score is 1 + 1 = 2. - 2: numsleft is [0,0]. numsright is [1,0]. The score is 2 + 1 = 3. - 3: numsleft is [0,0,1]. numsright is [0]. The score is 2 + 0 = 2. - 4: numsleft is [0,0,1,0]. numsright is []. The score is 3 + 0 = 3. Indices 2 and 4 both have the highest possible division score 3. Note the answer [4,2] would also be accepted.

testcases.input: nums = [0,0,0] Output: [3] Explanation: Division at index - 0: numsleft is []. numsright is [0,0,0]. The score is 0 + 0 = 0. - 1: numsleft is [0]. numsright is [0,0]. The score is 1 + 0 = 1. - 2: numsleft is [0,0]. numsright is [0]. The score is 2 + 0 = 2. - 3: numsleft is [0,0,0]. numsright is []. The score is 3 + 0 = 3. Only index 3 has the highest possible division score 3.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3] Explanation: Division at index - 0: numsleft is []. numsright is [0,0,0]. The score is 0 + 0 = 0. - 1: numsleft is [0]. numsright is [0,0]. The score is 1 + 0 = 1. - 2: numsleft is [0,0]. numsright is [0]. The score is 2 + 0 = 2. - 3: numsleft is [0,0,0]. numsright is []. The score is 3 + 0 = 3. Only index 3 has the highest possible division score 3.

testcases.input: nums = [1,1] Output: [0] Explanation: Division at index - 0: numsleft is []. numsright is [1,1]. The score is 0 + 2 = 2. - 1: numsleft is [1]. numsright is [1]. The score is 0 + 1 = 1. - 2: numsleft is [1,1]. numsright is []. The score is 0 + 0 = 0. Only index 0 has the highest possible division score 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0] Explanation: Division at index - 0: numsleft is []. numsright is [1,1]. The score is 0 + 2 = 2. - 1: numsleft is [1]. numsright is [1]. The score is 0 + 1 = 1. - 2: numsleft is [1,1]. numsright is []. The score is 0 + 0 = 0. Only index 0 has the highest possible division score 2.
